Bash(/Users/kelaichen/.local/share/mamba/envs/gmvae/bin/python3 - <<'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.read_csv\('output_gmmvae/cluster_vs_label.csv'\)

print\("=== CLUSTER vs LABEL OVERVIEW ==="\)
print\(f"Total samples: {len\(df\)}"\)
print\(f"Active clusters: {sorted\(df['cluster'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Unique true classes: {df['methylation_class'].nunique\(\)}"\)

print\("\\n=== PER-CLUSTER DOMINANT CLASS AND PURITY ==="\)
for c in sorted\(df['cluster'].unique\(\)\):
    sub = df[df['cluster'] == c]
    top3 = sub['methylation_class'].value_counts\(\).head\(3\)
    dom = top3.index[0]
    dom_n = top3.iloc[0]
    purity = dom_n / len\(sub\)
    top3_str = ', '.join\([f"{cls}\({n}\)" for cls, n in top3.items\(\)]\)
    print\(f"  Cluster {c:2d} | n={len\(sub\):4d} | purity={purity:.2f} | dominant={dom:<25s} | top3: {top3_str}"\)

print\("\\n=== ETMR AND CNS NB, FOXR2 SPECIFIC CHECK ==="\)
for label in ['ETMR', 'CNS NB, FOXR2']:
    sub = df[df['methylation_class'] == label]
    print\(f"\\n{label} \(n={len\(sub\)}\):"\)
    print\(sub['cluster'].value_counts\(\).to_string\(\)\)
    for c in sub['cluster'].unique\(\):
        cluster_sub = df[df['cluster'] == c]
        purity_in_cluster = len\(sub[sub['cluster']==c]\) / len\(cluster_sub\)
        print\(f"  → In cluster {c}: {len\(sub[sub['cluster']==c]\)}/{len\(cluster_sub\)} samples \({purity_in_cluster*100:.1f}% of that cluster\)"\)
EOF)

Bash(/Users/kelaichen/.local/share/mamba/envs/gmvae/bin/python3 - <<'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from sklearn.metrics import adjusted_rand_score, normalized_mutual_info_score, homogeneity_score, completeness_score

df = pd.read_csv\('output_gmmvae/cluster_vs_label.csv'\)
true = df['methylation_class']
pred = df['cluster']

print\("=== GLOBAL METRICS ==="\)
print\(f"ARI         : {adjusted_rand_score\(true, pred\):.4f}"\)
print\(f"NMI         : {normalized_mutual_info_score\(true, pred\):.4f}"\)
print\(f"Homogeneity : {homogeneity_score\(true, pred\):.4f}"\)
print\(f"Completeness: {completeness_score\(true, pred\):.4f}"\)

print\("\\n=== PIPELINE FILE CHECK ==="\)
import os
files = [
    'output_gmmvae/embedding.npy',
    'output_gmmvae/cluster_probabilities.npy',
    'output_gmmvae/cluster_assignment.csv',
    'output_gmmvae/embedding.csv',
    'output_gmmvae/embedding_2d_umap.csv',
    'output_gmmvae/model.pt',
    'output_gmmvae/run_config.json',
    'output_gmmvae/genes_used.txt',
    'output_gmmvae/cluster_vs_label.csv',
    'output_gmmvae/sample_labels.txt',
    'output_gmmvae/GSE90496_series_matrix.txt.gz',
]
for f in files:
    exists = os.path.exists\(f\)
    size = os.path.getsize\(f\) if exists else 0
    print\(f"  {'✓' if exists else '✗'} {f:<55s} {size:>10,} bytes"\)

print\("\\n=== SAMPLE COUNT CONSISTENCY CHECK ==="\)
emb = np.load\('output_gmmvae/embedding.npy'\)
probs = np.load\('output_gmmvae/cluster_probabilities.npy'\)
ca = pd.read_csv\('output_gmmvae/cluster_assignment.csv'\)
umap = pd.read_csv\('output_gmmvae/embedding_2d_umap.csv'\)
print\(f"embedding.npy rows      : {emb.shape[0]}"\)
print\(f"cluster_probabilities   : {probs.shape[0]}"\)
print\(f"cluster_assignment rows : {len\(ca\)}"\)
print\(f"embedding_2d_umap rows  : {len\(umap\)}"\)
print\(f"cluster_vs_label rows   : {len\(df\)}"\)
all_match = len\({emb.shape[0], probs.shape[0], len\(ca\), len\(umap\), len\(df\)}\) == 1
print\(f"All consistent          : {all_match}"\)

print\("\\n=== EMBEDDING QUALITY ==="\)
print\(f"Embedding shape   : {emb.shape}"\)
print\(f"Embedding std/dim : {emb.std\(axis=0\).round\(3\)}"\)
print\(f"Active dims \(>0.1\): {\(emb.std\(axis=0\) > 0.1\).sum\(\)}"\)

print\("\\n=== CONFIDENCE CHECK ==="\)
max_probs = probs.max\(axis=1\)
print\(f"Mean confidence : {max_probs.mean\(\):.4f}"\)
print\(f"conf > 0.9      : {\(max_probs > 0.9\).sum\(\)} \({\(max_probs > 0.9\).mean\(\)*100:.1f}%\)"\)
print\(f"conf < 0.5      : {\(max_probs < 0.5\).sum\(\)}"\)

print\("\\n=== CLUSTER 9 \(ETMR\) and CLUSTER 10 \(CNS NB FOXR2\) DEEP CHECK ==="\)
for c, label in [\(9, 'ETMR'\), \(10, 'CNS NB, FOXR2'\)]:
    mask = ca['cluster'] == c
    conf = max_probs[mask.values]
    print\(f"Cluster {c} \({label}\): n={mask.sum\(\)}, mean_conf={conf.mean\(\):.4f}, min_conf={conf.min\(\):.4f}"\)
EOF)
